overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through Night City's urban downtown. The camera follows a character along sidewalks and under overpasses, passing pedestrians and futuristic architecture in bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown sidewalk with dedicated red bike lane

events.description: pedestrian with spiky black hair passes close to camera on the left, temporarily blocking view
approaching the elevated highway overpass, entering the shadowed area beneath

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red paved sidewalk, approaching the overpass structure ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with spiky black hair and leather jacket walking past the camera
pedestrian in purple tank top and jeans walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure spanning across the street ahead
tall modern glass building with reflective windows in the background
distinctive red painted bike lane and sidewalk running along the street
safety railing separating the sidewalk from the vehicle street
tall reddish-brown concrete retaining wall on the right side of the path
tropical palm trees visible between buildings
large futuristic digital advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright, sunlit downtown sidewalk with a distinctive red paved path. The camera walks forward past pedestrians, approaching a large elevated highway overpass in the distance. Modern glass skyscrapers rise in the background while a red concrete wall lines the right side of the path.

events.description: entering deep shadow under the overpass, lighting becomes significantly darker and cooler
exiting the overpass shadow back into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the dark overpass, navigating through pedestrians in the dim light

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red mohawk and white shirt walking alongside the camera
pedestrian in white tank top and red pants walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars supporting the highway overhead
small yellow and green pawn shop booth with signage
construction barriers with yellow and black stripes

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the massive elevated highway, entering a dimly lit covered area with concrete support pillars. The lighting shifts dramatically to shadow as it passes a pawn shop kiosk and construction barriers, then begins to emerge back into sunlight at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with digital signage

events.description: emerging from under overpass into open commercial street with large digital billboards
crossing a street intersection with vehicles passing on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit commercial district with large digital billboards overhead, crossing an intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright green hair and red patterned outfit standing near the street edge
pedestrian in white crop top and shorts walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: modern glass facade commercial buildings lining the street
large digital advertising screens spanning across the street overhead
ground level shop entrances and display windows
tall modern street lamp posts along the sidewalk
marked pedestrian crossing area at the street intersection

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass shadow, the scene opens into a bright commercial district with glass buildings and massive digital billboards spanning the street. The camera crosses an intersection with moderate vehicle traffic, passing pedestrians with distinctive cyberpunk fashion including bright green hair.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with industrial elements

events.description: entering a narrower urban canyon with stacked cargo boxes and industrial AC units visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrower urban street with commercial storefronts and industrial elements on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in beige jacket and pants walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: taller, closer building facades creating a canyon effect
pedestrian bridge or walkway connecting buildings overhead
stacks of cardboard boxes and cargo on the sidewalk
large external air conditioning units mounted on building exterior
illuminated neon signs and advertisements on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrower urban canyon with buildings closer on both sides. The camera passes stacked cardboard boxes and industrial AC units on the right, while overhead walkways and neon signage become visible in the distance ahead, maintaining the dense cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit downtown district that dips into deep urban shadows before emerging into a dense, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins on a bright sidewalk with a red paved path, moving past pedestrians and glass skyscrapers toward a looming elevated highway. As the camera passes under the massive overpass, the lighting shifts dramatically to shadow among concrete pillars, pawn shop kiosks, and construction barriers. The scene then opens back into the brilliant midday sun of a commercial district, crossing a busy intersection filled with digital billboards and pedestrians in vibrant cyberpunk fashion. Finally, the path narrows into an urban canyon, passing industrial AC units and stacked boxes as overhead walkways and neon signage appear in the distance.
